title: Future Stars edge out All Stars
description: CRICKET NEWS - Hosts Future Stars FC...
bodyText:
> Onele Somacala scored the first goal through a set piece, putting pressure on All Stars’ defence, which was exposed at the back.


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
